name: The gallery search and discipline filter narrow the studio list
description: On the home gallery, searching and using a discipline filter change which studios are listed and the result count updates.

planSteps.description: Verify the studio count near the sort control shows three studios and three studio cards are listed
Type the word podcast into the studio search field
Verify only one studio card, 'Signal Podcast Booth', remains listed and the count shows one studio
Verify only 'Resonance Music Room' remains listed
